description_long: This is a modern, two-story bungalow enclosed within a low perimeter wall, featuring a flat roof and a prominent rectangular chimney. The front yard includes a blue-tiled swimming pool and a small patio area with outdoor furniture, while the main entrance is marked by a black wrought-iron gate. The building facade is characterized by large, evenly spaced windows and a shaded balcony running along the upper floor. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, and the overall structure is boxy and minimalist. The rear of the property is more private, with fewer windows and a simple, clean design. The surrounding yard is mostly paved, with a small strip of greenery along one side.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a swimming pool, and a perimeter wall with a wrought-iron gate.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, swimming pool, patio area, and the full facade with large windows and balcony.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the building, the flat roof, and the perimeter wall with minimal window visibility.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, chimney, and the private yard area with fewer windows.
description_view_3: Opposite front view showing the pool, patio, and the main gate, with a clear look at the balcony and shaded areas.
